title: hibiscus donianus
intro: Hibiscus donianus, a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae, is native to the tropical regions of India and Sri Lanka. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as hypertension and edema. The health benefits of hibiscus donianus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Hibiscus donianus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to support cardiovascular health and promote overall well-being.
